  • Marketplace
  • ECUs

TCU_L38EVChina

OBD Information

Protocol: CAN
Send ID: 7CA
Recv ID: 7DA
Baudrate: 10400
Func Addr: 77
Func Name: DCM Renault

        "bitoffset": 6
      },
      "defaultTCUtime.seconds": {
        "firstbyte": 7,
        "bitoffset": 2
      },
      "defaultTCUtime.year": {
        "firstbyte": 4
      }
    }
  },
